sub_modules.fft16_bit_reverse: Combinational bit-reversal address mapper for DIT natural-order FFT output.
sub_modules.fft16_stage_indexer: Combinational radix-2 stage controller helper that maps stage and butterfly count to memory pair addresses and twiddle index.
sub_modules.fft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient lookup table for N=16.
sub_modules.fft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point radix-2 complex butterfly with Q1.15 twiddle multiplication.
sub_modules.fft16_output_scale: Combinational output normalizer that applies divide-by-16 only in IFFT mode.
